title: CryptoService Transaction Boundary Fix
description: CryptoService.rotate_keys (services/crypto.py:288) calls session.commit() directly inside the service. Services should not commit — the caller (route handler or lifecycle manager) should own the transaction boundary. If rotate_keys is composed with other operations in a single transaction, the premature commit could leave the database inconsistent on subsequent failures. Remove the commit from the service and ensure callers manage the transaction.
validation: Callers of rotate_keys manage their own transaction boundaries
Lifespan startup still correctly commits after key rotation
No change in behavior for existing flows
Tests verify transaction boundary is respected
